mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_form_data WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT * FROM rp_form_data WHERE form_code = #{formCode} AND flag = '启用' ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_form_data (id, form_code, business_key, data_json, status, submitter, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{formCode}, #{businessKey}, #{dataJson}, #{status}, #{submitter}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
